data.content: Shipment completed. Feature branch knots-5403-upgrade-banner merged to main via f8b3102, with formatting fixes (a22e9e5) for rustfmt max_width=100 config added after branch point, and integration test fix (d59e99a) to use dynamic package version instead of hardcoded v0.11.0. All pushed to origin/main. CI green (run 23746460324). 95.10% coverage maintained.
